title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-06
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Greenhouse checkup
gist.blurb: Polly's been busy counting the flowers in the greenhouse. Daily app metrics and health checks have been automatically updated!
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in the repository.
gist.impact: Keeps the app directory and greenhouse documentation current with the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a gardener/inspector, checking on various pixel-art plants (representing apps) in a cozy greenhouse setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, holding a small clipboard and checking on glowing code-plants in a warm greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, holding a small clipboard and checking on glowing code-plants in a warm greenhouse.
